seoTitle: Tarlo vs Tarrawanna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tarlo and Tarrawanna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarlo and Tarrawanna.
heading: Tarlo vs Tarrawanna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarlo, New South Wales and Tarrawanna, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarrawanna has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tarlo (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarlo or Tarrawanna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarlo has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Tarrawanna scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarlo scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Tarrawanna scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarlo or Tarrawanna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarrawanna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
